description: This figure presents planar projections of Young's modulus (unit: GPa) of Fe₁₋ₓMnₓAl (x ranges from 0 to 1, covering 9 compositions: FeAl, Fe₀.₈₇₅Mn₀.₁₂₅Al, Fe₀.₇₅Mn₀.₂₅Al, Fe₀.₆₂₅Mn₀.₃₇₅Al, Fe₀.₅Mn₀.₅Al, Fe₀.₃₇₅Mn₀.₆₂₅Al, Fe₀.₂₅Mn₀.₇₅Al, Fe₀.₁₂₅Mn₀.₈₇₅Al, MnAl) obtained from density functional theory calculations. The first subplot shows projections on the (001) crystallographic plane with axes corresponding to Young's modulus along the [100] and [010] directions, while the second subplot shows projections on the (110) plane with axes for the [1$ ar{1}$0] and [001] directions. All contours deviate from spherical shapes, indicating strong anisotropy of Young's modulus for all studied alloys. Along the [100], [010], [001], and [110] directions, Fe₀.₁₂₅Mn₀.₈₇₅Al exhibits the maximum Young's modulus, while MnAl shows the minimum. This figure confirms the strong orientation-dependent elastic anisotropy of Fe-Mn-Al alloy systems, providing theoretical support for mechanical property modulation of these alloys.
